entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Eleusine coracana) affected by blast disease.

entities.name: PYCULARIA GRISEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen (teleomorph: Magnaporthe grisea) that causes blast disease.

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A devastating disease of finger millet affecting production, utilization, and trade.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where finger millet production is affected by blast.

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region where finger millet production is affected by blast.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where M. grisea isolates were collected for study.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: An Indian state where M. grisea isolates were collected.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: An Indian state where M. grisea isolates were collected.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where M. grisea isolates were collected.

entities.name: VIZIANAGARAM
entities.description: A location in India from which the virulent isolate Pg23 was collected.

entities.name: HOST DIFFERENTIALS
entities.description: A set of germplasm accessions used to determine virulence diversity in pathogen populations.

entities.name: PATHOGENIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in virulence among populations of the pathogen M. grisea.

entities.name: PATHOTYPES
entities.description: Groups of pathogen isolates categorized based on their reaction to host differentials.

entities.name: BLAST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of finger millet to resist infection by the blast pathogen, used in breeding programs.
